titleStmt.title: SII 38.477: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 477. (A.R. No. 477 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription records that an individual Bālaṟāvāyaṉ, who served at Nālāyiravaṉtirumaḍam (situated) to the north of Tiruttūṟai-nāyanār temple, sold a maṭha at Śelva Tiruvārūr on account of the shortage of space (sic). It further records that the amount realized from the sale was utilized as capital for the renovation of Mudaliyār-maṭham alias Nētradēvar-maṭham.

It further mentions that the above person bought three pieces of land to the extent of 4 mā, 3 kāṇi and half-a-kāṇi, which were exempted from taxes by the ūraravar as ūr-kīḻ-iṟaiyili, for providing food offerings to the persons who rendered services at the maṭham.
Pūśalāṅkuḍaiyāṉ, Ārvala-nāḍu uḍaiyāṉ and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī�
�Read rājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu Uṭaiyār tiruttu
ṟaināyaṉār santikku vaṭakkil nālāyiravaṉ tiruma
ṭattu Iruntu tirutoṇṭu ceyyum pālaṟā
vāyiṉeṉ celva tiruvāruri tekkil tiruvitiyilāṉa maṭa
m Iṭam porāteṉṟu Immaṭam viṟṟu Ikkāciṭṭu tiruku
ḷattukku teṉkaraiyil kiḻaimaṭattu mutaliyār
maṭamāy nettiratevar Irunta maṭam ceṅkal ce
yya tiruppaṇikku Uṭalākavum �Read rājentiracoḻavaḷanāṭ
ṭu Ārvalakūṟṟattu pūcalānkuṭiyil paṇaikiḻāṉ co
kkaṉ �Read rājarājatevaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa tirucciṟṟam
palam varu varuṣam �m Ittaṭiyil pūcalāṅkuṭaiyāṉ
marutiṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ nampiyāḻvāṉ pakkal vilai
koṇṭa » mukkāṇi m perum poruṭaiyāṉ tiruvuṭaimaru
tuṭaiyāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa taṭivaittiṭal
nāṟṟaṅkāl » 1kāṇiyum Āka » � tma� Innilam nālu mā
mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Ivvūr Ūravar Ūrkkiḻ
Iṟaiyili ceyitu cantirātittavaraiyum Immaṭa
ttukku tiruvamutu ceṣamākap paṇṇittantapaṭik
ku Eḻuttiṭṭār pūcalāṅkuṭaiyāṉ Ārvalanāṭuṭai
yāṉ pūcalāṅkuṭaiyāṉ karikālacoḻamuventave
ḷāṉ pūcalāṅkuṭaiyāṉ Ārvalanāṭṭukkoṉ pū
lāṅkuṭaiyāṉ marutiṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ nampiyāḻvāṉ
milaṭṭuṭaiyāṉ kaṇṭarātittatevaṉ maṟṟum Ivvūrār
Eḻuttiṭṭa cātaṉappaṭi Innilattu Uṭalkoṇṭu Im
maṭattu Iruntu tiruttoṇṭu ceyyum tirumeṉikaḷuk
ku tiruvamutu ceḻamāka kuṭutteṉ pālaṟāvāyaṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 38.477 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
